samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input multiplicand. 8-bit input multiplier. 16-bit output product. Bit width for multiplicand and multiplier. Bit width for product.

Initialize

product [15:0] = 16'b0;

for each bit in multiplier

for (int i = 0; i < BIT_WIDTH; i++) {

  • if the bit is set

    if (B[i] == 1) {

    • add the shifted multiplicand to the product at the corresponding shifted position

      product[i +: BIT_WIDTH] = product[i +: BIT_WIDTH] + A;

shift the multiplicand left by one bit

A = A << 1;

end loop

}
